faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Belleville, NJ?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Belleville typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of colonies present. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my Belleville home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common ants (up to 5/8 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. You may notice wood shavings or frass near baseboards, hear rustling sounds in walls, or see large winged ants during spring. Our technicians can provide accurate identification during a free inspection.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take in Belleville?
faqs.answer: Initial carpenter ant treatment typically takes 1-2 hours depending on your property size and infestation severity. Complete elimination usually requires 2-4 weeks as treated ants carry materials back to the colony. Follow-up visits ensure all colonies are eliminated and your Belleville home remains protected.

faqs.question: Can carpenter ants damage my Belleville home's structure?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants excavate wood to build their nests, which can compromise structural integrity over time. They're particularly attracted to moisture-damaged wood common in basements, attics, and around windows. Early professional treatment is essential to prevent costly structural repairs in Belleville's diverse housing stock.
